name: Urban Tech Neon Sneakers
description: High-top breathable streetwear sneakers with neon pink highlights. Designed with premium responsive cushioning and durable tech laces for unmatched style and fit.

name: Lumière Quilted Handbag
description: Exquisite textured black leather handbag with a gold-tone interlocking clasp and elegant chain-link shoulder strap. Features multiple inner compartments for luxury organization.

name: Luna Velvet Gala Gown
description: Stunning one-shoulder evening gown made of rich velvet fabric. Form-fitting bodice cascading into a dramatic drape with a daring side split. Perfect for showstopping elegance.

name: Starlight Neon Stilettos
description: Premium glossy neon pink high heels with a sharp metallic stiletto heel and adjustable ankle strap. Perfect for making a bold fashion statement on any night out.
